name: Chocolate Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 Package Pillsbury 3 Dozen Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough, (refrigerated)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 360°F.
2. Grease the pizza pan.
3. Press cookie dough evenly around the pan.
4. Bake for 12-13 minutes.
5. Remove the pan from the oven and distribute about 2/3 of the chocolate chips on the dough.
6. Return the pan to the over for a minute.
7. Remove the pan from the oven and spread melted chocolate evenly on the dough.
8. Let cool slightly.
9. Warm the frosting for easy spreading.
10. Spread evenly on the top of the melted chocolate, leaving a border around the edge.
11. Sprinkle the remaining chocolate chips and walnut pieces on top.
12. Let cool slightly before cutting into small pieces.
